title: Ivanhoe
description: Ivanhoe — knowledge fragments for AI agents

memes.label: About This Wiki
memes.description: A knowledge wiki for "艾凡赫" — this page is auto-generated from book metadata

memes.label: 鲍德温·德·奥莱
memes.description: 布瓦-吉贝尔骑士的 squire，在阿什比比武大会上代表 Norman 阵营出场，态度傲慢无礼
aliases: the squire of Brian de Bois-Guilbert

memes.label: Black Knight (King Richard I)
memes.description: King Richard I of England in disguise, appearing as a mysterious black-armoured knight who participates in the Tournament at Ashby and aids the captives at Torquilstone before revealing his true identity.

memes.label: 布赖恩·德·博希-吉尔伯特
Chivalry
memes.description: The medieval code of knightly conduct — honour, martial prowess, and courtly behaviour — as portrayed in Walter Scott's Ivanhoe

memes.label: 科普曼赫斯特文书（Clerk of Copmanhurst）
Coningsburgh Castle
memes.description: Athelstane of Coningsburgh's ancestral castle in Yorkshire, a key Saxon stronghold and the site of Rebecca and Ivanhoe's imprisonment by Front-de-Boeuf.

memes.label: Copmanhurst
memes.description: A hermitage and chapel in Yorkshire associated with the Clerk of Copmanhurst, the Saxon priest who serves Athelstane's household.

memes.label: Crusade
memes.description: The religious-military expeditions to the Holy Land — the backdrop against which Ivanhoe's knights measure their honour and from which they return transformed

memes.label: Edith of Coningsburgh
memes.description: The mother of Athelstane of Coningsburgh, a Saxon noblewoman who plays a key role in the novel's resolution by persuading Athelstane to abandon his ambitions for the Saxon throne and support Wilfred of Ivanhoe.

memes.label: 弗赖尔·塔克
memes.description: 罗宾汉传说中的 jovial 修士，在小说中与理查德国王在森林中相遇，以好食好饮和善于使棍著称

memes.label: 圣殿骑士团大团长
memes.description: 圣殿骑士团的大团长（Grand Master），在小说中为年迈偏执的 Lucas de Beaumanoir，在坦姆勒斯托修道院主持对丽贝卡的审判

memes.label: Heraldry
memes.description: The system of visual symbols identifying knights by their shield devices — the language of identity and honour in the chivalric world of Ivanhoe

memes.label: Justice
memes.description: The administration of law in 12th-century England — a fractured system of Norman feudal courts, ecclesiastical tribunals, and the ancient right of trial by combat

memes.label: Knights Templar
memes.description: The medieval military order whose knight Brian de Bois-Guilbert serves as the novel's primary antagonist from the religious orders.

memes.label: Leicester
memes.description: A town in the English Midlands mentioned as the location of the tournament at Ashby and as the home of Isaac of York.

memes.label: Nathan Ben Israel
memes.description: The chief rabbi and elder of the Jewish community of York, who appears at the trial of Rebecca and whose intercession is sought by Isaac of York to save his daughter.

memes.label: 奥斯瓦尔德
memes.description: 塞德里克的贴身斟酒 servant，在小说中负责管理庄园事务，在艾凡赫初回罗瑟伍德时扮演了 gatekeeper 角色

memes.label: Palestine
memes.description: The Holy Land, referenced in the novel as the destination of the Crusaders and the context for the Templar Order's origins.

memes.label: The Palmer (Wilfred of Ivanhoe)
memes.description: The pilgrim identity assumed by Wilfred of Ivanhoe upon his return from the Crusades, under which he travels through England observing the state of his country before revealing himself at the Tournament at Ashby.

memes.label: 金雀花王朝
memes.description: 金雀花王朝（Plantagenet）是英格兰中世纪最重要的王朝之一，在小说中以 "Richard Plantagenet" 称呼理查德国王，体现其王朝血统

memes.label: 坦普尔斯托预修院（Preceptory of Templestowe）
拉尔夫·德·维邦（Ralph de Vipont）
aliases: Ralph de Vipont of St John

memes.label: Ransom
memes.description: The medieval practice of capturing enemies for profit — a central economic reality of warfare and tournament that shaped the fortunes of Ivanhoe's characters

memes.label: Rebecca
memes.description: The beautiful and virtuous daughter of Isaac of York, whose trial for sorcery forms the moral centre of the novel.

memes.label: Rotherwood
memes.description: The Saxon estate and fortified hall of Cedric the Saxon, serving as the primary Saxon stronghold in the novel's opening chapters.

memes.label: Sherwood Forest
memes.description: The famous forest in Nottinghamshire, the traditional refuge of outlaws and the domain of Robin Hood and his Merry Men.

memes.label: Torquilstone Castle
memes.description: The Norman fortress of the tyrannical Front-de-Boeuf, where the novel's most dramatic siege sequence unfolds.

memes.label: Tournament
memes.description: The medieval tournament as a formal chivalric contest — the centrepiece spectacle of Ivanhoe's Ashby-de-la-Zouche passages

memes.label: Tournament at Ashby
memes.description: The great tournament at Ashby-de-la-Zouche, the climactic event of Ivanhoe's early chapters where the Disinherited Knight wins renown.

memes.label: Urfried (Ulrica)
memes.description: The birth name of Ulrica, the Saxon noblewoman who appears as a housekeeper at Torquilstone Castle and ultimately burns the castle down in revenge for her family's murder by the Normans.

memes.label: Wilfred of Ivanhoe
memes.description: The Saxon knight and protagonist of the novel, son of Cedric the Saxon and hero of the Tournament at Ashby.
